post.description: Receives payment notifications from Paystack. Signature verification is required. This endpoint is public (no authentication) but secured by webhook signature.

info.title: Eventful API
info.description: API documentation for the Eventful application

phone.description: Phone number of the user in Nigerian format

role.description: Role of the user (creator or eventee)

startDate.description: Event start datetime. Must be in the future.

endDate.description: Event end datetime. Must be after startDate.

price.description: Price per ticket. Use 0 for free tickets.

quantity.description: Total tickets available for this tier

salesStart.description: When ticket sales open for this tier

salesEnd.description: When ticket sales close. Must be strictly before event startDate.

enabled.description: Whether reminders are sent to ticket holders

intervals.description: Hours before event to send each reminder. e.g. [168, 24, 2] = 7 days, 1 day, 2 hours before.

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier. Auto-generated from title if omitted. Must be unique.

description.example: Experience the African Giant live at the iconic Eko Hotel grounds.

images.description: Array of image URLs. Populate via POST /events/:id/images after creation.

eventType.description: Event format. Determines which location fields are required.

venue.description: Physical location details. Required when eventType is "physical" or "hybrid".

meetingLink.description: Zoom, Google Meet, Teams or similar link. Required when eventType is "online" or "hybrid".

ticketTiers.description: At least one tier required. Total quantity across all tiers must not exceed capacity.

capacity.description: Maximum total attendees. Must be >= sum of all tier quantities.

isFeatured.description: Pin event to the featured list

price.description: Price per ticket. Use 0 for free tickets.

quantity.description: Total tickets available for this tier

salesStart.description: When ticket sales open for this tier

salesEnd.description: When ticket sales close. Must be strictly before event startDate.

price.description: Update price. Existing purchases are not affected.

quantity.description: Adjust available quantity. Cannot be reduced below tickets already sold.

benefits.description: Full replacement of benefits array — not a merge. Send the complete desired list.

salesStart.description: Adjust when sales open. Must be before salesEnd.

salesEnd.description: Adjust when sales close. Must be strictly before event startDate.

slug.description: Update the URL slug. Must be unique across all events.

description.example: Experience the African Giant live at the iconic Eko Hotel grounds.

images.description: Array of image URLs. Populate via POST /events/:id/images after creation.

eventType.description: Cannot be changed after tickets have been sold.

venue.description: Physical location details. Required when eventType is "physical" or "hybrid".

meetingLink.description: Zoom, Google Meet, Teams or similar link. Required when eventType is "online" or "hybrid".

ticketTiers.description: At least one tier required. Total quantity across all tiers must not exceed capacity.

capacity.description: Maximum total attendees. Must be >= sum of all tier quantities.

isFeatured.description: Pin event to the featured list

status.description: Override event status directly. Use POST /:id/publish for the standard publish flow.

name.description: Full name of the attendee for this ticket

tierId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the ticket tier

quantity.description: Number of tickets to purchase. Maximum 10 per transaction.

attendees.description: Optional attendee information for each ticket. If provided, array length must match quantity. If purchasing for yourself only, you can omit this field.

qrCodeData.description: Encrypted QR code data from the ticket

tierId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the ticket tier

attendees.description: Optional attendee information for each ticket
